fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 66 is inverted: clamping is applied when `clamp` is False and skipped when `clamp` is True. It should be `if clamp:` not `if not clamp:`.

constraints.intent: When clamp=True the branch should be entered (clamping applied); the inverted condition means clamping happens only when clamp=False, which is wrong.
The then-branch of the clamp guard should only execute when clamp is True; if it executes when clamp is False the condition is inverted.
lo and hi should only be computed when clamping is requested (clamp=True); computing them when clamp=False indicates the branch condition is inverted.

spec.expr: (not clamp) or (y__5 >= min(y0, y1) and y__5 <= max(y0, y1))

constraints.intent: When clamp=True the final y value must lie within [min(y0,y1), max(y0,y1)]; if clamping is skipped for clamp=True this will be violated.
